astrocoords 0.0.1
  • Get started

    • Working with time

Package index

All functions

ang_sep()
Angular separation on the sphere
b()
Galactic latitude accessor
dec()
Declination accessor
frame()
Frame accessor
gal_coord()
Sugar constructor for Galactic coordinates
galactic()
Galactic frame
get_sky_coord_notation()
Get sky_coord print notation
iau_name()
Build IAU-style source names from sky coordinates
icrs()
ICRS frame
jd2greg()
POSIXct from Julian Date
jd_fromdate()
Julian Date from date-time
l()
Galactic longitude accessor
mjd2greg()
POSIXct from Modified Julian Date
new_sky_coord()
Low-level sky coordinate constructor
parse_coord()
Parse coordinate strings into ICRS sky_coord
ra()
Right ascension accessor
ra_dec()
Sugar constructor for ICRS coordinates
radec()
Deprecated alias for parse_coord
rcpp_hello_world()
Simple function using Rcpp
separation()
Angular separation between sky coordinates
set_print_hms()
Use HMS/DMS print style for sky_coord
set_print_pair()
Use pair print style for sky_coord
set_print_plain()
Use plain print style for sky_coord
set_sky_coord_notation()
Set sky_coord print notation
sky_coord()
User-facing sky coordinate constructor
sky_frame()
Generic sky frame constructor
transform_galactic_to_icrs()
Transform Galactic coordinates to ICRS frame
transform_icrs_to_galactic()
Transform ICRS coordinates to Galactic frame
transform_to()
Transform sky coordinates to another frame

Developed by Grigory Uskov.
